channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Therabody Promo Codes: 15% Off March 2026
item.description: Save on the science-backed devices you’ve been eyeing with 15% off Theragun discount code and 30% off other great deals.

item.title: Lenovo Coupon Codes and Deals: $5,000+ Off
item.description: Whether you’re shopping for a ThinkPad, Yoga laptop, or Legion gaming PC, these Lenovo discount codes and promotions can help you save big on your next tech upgrade.

item.title: Tuft & Needle Promo Codes: 20% Off | March 2026
item.description: Save 20% on best-selling mattresses with our top Tuft & Needle coupon codes.

item.title: Hulu Promo Codes & Discounts: 20% Off in March
item.description: Students can get a Hulu plan for $1.99 per month. Get more details on this and other great deals below.

item.title: Factor Promo Code: 50% Off Off Meal Prep
item.description: Make meal prep easier for any dietary need while enjoying great savings with our hand-picked Factor discount codes this March.

item.title: 60% HP Discount Codes & Coupons March 2026
item.description: Save up to 60%, plus an extra 20% with HP promo codes for laptops, printers, PCs, and more tech.

item.title: 20% Squarespace Promo Codes | March 2026
item.description: Get 20% off your next website, 10% off with exclusive Squarespace discount code, 50% off plans, and more top coupons from WIRED.

item.title: LegalZoom Promo Code: Exclusive 10% Off LLC Formations
item.description: Save on top services at LegalZoom, like LLC registration, incorporation, estate plans, and more with coupons and deals from WIRED.

item.title: 50% Off Verizon Promo Codes | March 2026
item.description: Save with Verizon coupon codes for $1,100 off Galaxy S25 phones, free iPhone 17 Pros, and up to 50% off plans.

item.title: Why is OpenAI like this?
item.description: ChatGPT developer OpenAI has killed off Sora, its shortform video app. What is CEO Sam Altman planning next for the AI company?
